title: lilium elatum
intro: Lilium elatum, also known as the evening lily or lady's evening star, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid compounds. The health benefits of Lilium elatum include its ability to reduce pain, fever, and inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for treating various ailments such as colds, sore throats, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
